mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ledger_txn WHERE biz_group_key = #{bizGroupKey} ORDER BY created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ledger_txn ( txn_id, user_id, family_id, txn_type, biz_group_key, product_id, order_id, related_txn_id, related_order_id, relation_type, requested_at, trade_date, nav_date, confirm_date, fetch_date, status, note, category_id, is_reimbursable, is_reimbursed, is_reversed, reversed_by_txn_id, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{txnId}, #{userId}, #{familyId}, #{txnType}, #{bizGroupKey}, #{productId}, #{orderId}, #{relatedTxnId}, #{relatedOrderId}, #{relationType}, #{requestedAt}, #{tradeDate}, #{navDate}, #{confirmDate}, #{fetchDate}, #{status}, #{note}, #{categoryId}, #{isReimbursable}, #{isReimbursed}, #{isReversed}, #{reversedByTxnId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE ledger_txn SET status = #{status}, note = #{note}, category_id = #{categoryId}, is_reimbursable = #{isReimbursable}, is_reimbursed = #{isReimbursed}, is_reversed = #{isReversed}, reversed_by_txn_id = #{reversedByTxnId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
